回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 專題研究(二) (Directed Research II)	開課班級 : 應英四甲	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 吳唯邦,李盈興	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course aims to help students complete a project of their topic throughout this semester. Survey (using questionnaires) is introduced, among the other methods, to collect the data on (but not limited to) second language (L2) research. Students will learn to ask their questions, construct and administer the questionnaires, process the data, and write up a well-organized English paper. 


2.教學綱要
The content of this semester contains:
- Making a logical proposal
- Finding resources and reviewing previous studies
- Designing a survey
- Data collection, analysis, and graphing
- Writing APA-style papers
- Presenting research results
